title: EntityRelationship_FVO
description: A uni-directionmal relationship from this entity to a target entity instance

role.description: The association role for this entity

@baseType.description: When sub-classing, this defines the super-class

relationshipType.description: Type of relationship such as migration, substitution, dependency, exclusivity
